allow:
Bash(gemini --all-files -p "Analyze this Java Spring Boot codebase comprehensively and provide a detailed analysis covering:

1. Overall Architecture: Main application structure, component interactions, and design patterns used
2. Domain Model: Core business entities, their relationships, and the business domain structure (users, centers, courses, enrollments, etc.)
3. API Design: Main REST API endpoints, functionality, and key API patterns and conventions
4. Security Implementation: JWT authentication and authorization implementation throughout the system
5. Data Layer: Repository patterns, JPA entity structures, and database design patterns
6. Service Layer: Business logic organization and service patterns
7. Key Features: Main business features implemented and how they work together
8. Testing Strategy: Testing organization, patterns, frameworks used, and coverage approaches
9. Configuration: Key configuration components and their setup
10. Code Quality: Overall code quality patterns, best practices followed, and potential areas for improvement

Focus on providing deep insights into the system''s architecture, implementation patterns, and how the different components work together to deliver the Tuition Management System functionality.")

Bash(gemini -y --include-directories src/main,src/test,docs "Analyze this Java Spring Boot codebase comprehensively and provide a detailed analysis covering:

1. Overall Architecture: Main application structure, component interactions, and design patterns used
2. Domain Model: Core business entities, their relationships, and the business domain structure (users, centers, courses, enrollments, etc.)
3. API Design: Main REST API endpoints, functionality, and key API patterns and conventions
4. Security Implementation: JWT authentication and authorization implementation throughout the system
5. Data Layer: Repository patterns, JPA entity structures, and database design patterns
6. Service Layer: Business logic organization and service patterns
7. Key Features: Main business features implemented and how they work together
8. Testing Strategy: Testing organization, patterns, frameworks used, and coverage approaches
9. Configuration: Key configuration components and their setup
10. Code Quality: Overall code quality patterns, best practices followed, and potential areas for improvement

Focus on providing deep insights into the system''s architecture, implementation patterns, and how the different components work together to deliver the Tuition Management System functionality.")

Bash(gemini -y "Analyze the main source code structure of this Java Spring Boot application. Focus on:

1. Package structure and main components in src/main/java
2. Key Spring Boot application entry point and main configuration classes
3. Core business entities in the entities package
4. Main REST controllers and API structure
5. Service layer organization
6. Security configuration implementation
7. Database and JPA configuration

Provide a clear overview of the application architecture and main components.")

Bash(gemini -y "Analyze the testing strategy and additional components of this Java Spring Boot application:

1. Testing structure in src/test - frameworks, patterns, and organization
2. DTOs and request/response patterns
3. Exception handling strategy
4. Utility classes and helper components
5. Key business features and workflows (enrollments, class management, etc.)
6. Database seeding and data initialization
7. API documentation setup
8. Code quality patterns and potential improvements

Focus on how these components support the main business functionality and maintain code quality.")

Bash(gemini -y "Analyze the business domain relationships and key implementation patterns in this Java Spring Boot application:

1. Entity relationships and data model design (JPA annotations, relationships, cascading)
2. Business logic patterns in the service layer 
3. Authentication and authorization flow implementation
4. Data validation patterns
5. Transaction management
6. Error handling in business logic
7. Integration patterns between different modules
8. Performance considerations and optimization patterns

Focus on how the business domain is modeled and the key architectural decisions made in the implementation.")

Bash(gemini --output-format json "Analyze the business domain relationships and key implementation patterns in this Java Spring Boot application:

1. Entity relationships and data model design (JPA annotations, relationships, cascading)
2. Business logic patterns in the service layer 
3. Authentication and authorization flow implementation
4. Data validation patterns
5. Transaction management
6. Error handling in business logic
7. Integration patterns between different modules
8. Performance considerations and optimization patterns

Focus on how the business domain is modeled and the key architectural decisions made in the implementation.")
